likely_causes: subject description is buried too deep
subject reference should be used but is missing
priority_fixes: switch to Omni Reference when needed

signals: each round looks like a different project
default model taste overrides the brief
prompt_delta_patterns: switch to concrete medium and lighting words

priority_fixes: move full-body and front-facing anchors earlier

likely_causes: garment and style are mixed together
too many design directions are demanded at once
priority_fixes: keep only the current main design language

likely_causes: the main reference is not locked
priority_fixes: keep only the validated parameter set

signals: the set has weak selection value
likely_causes: style and composition are not separated enough
priority_fixes: define one test axis per direction
split the board into clearer design lanes

signals: the output is not yet deliverable
likely_causes: exploration language is still too heavy
the task has not entered finalization
priority_fixes: use HD finishing only when justified

signals: the reference is not carried over correctly
style and subject roles are mixed
the latest user feedback is missing from the next round
the old goal is still being executed
priority_fixes: confirm keep and change lists first
regenerate the next prompt from the updated task
prompt_delta_patterns: change only around the latest feedback
remove content the user has already rejected

signals: the colorway cannot be read clearly
the palette collapses into gray-white mush
the top and bottom do not separate
likely_causes: the palette instruction is too vague
the background and clothing values are too close
multiple palette goals are mixed together
priority_fixes: name top, bottom, hardware, and accent separately
increase readable contrast without changing the structure

signals: the garment panel layout changes in a colorway task
likely_causes: the base design is not really locked
the model is still rerolling the subject
the prompt does not preserve structure strongly enough
priority_fixes: switch to the accepted base as the primary anchor
stop and relock the base before another color round
prompt_delta_patterns: preserve the same face and hairstyle
preserve the same silhouette and garment panel layout

signals: the task asks for colorway-only changes but no approved base design exists
likely_causes: the accepted base reference is missing from project context
priority_fixes: select or confirm one base design first
write the base reference into project context before recoloring
prompt_delta_patterns: do not run a colorway prompt until the base is locked

signals: a colorway task keeps changing structure, subject, and palette together
likely_causes: multiple change axes are mixed into one round
priority_fixes: keep only palette changes in the next round
